name: illumina-basespace
description: Reads and writes documented Illumina BaseSpace v1pre3 REST API resources through the declarative connector engine.

risk.read: external Illumina BaseSpace API read of documented v1pre3 resources
risk.write: external Illumina BaseSpace API mutations including settings, workflow, threshold, trash, lab requeue, and app session actions
risk.approval: required for every write action; destructive actions are marked confirm: destructive
